🌸 STORYLINE 🌸

{•This story follows Oda, a member of the Port Mafia, who has just completed a dangerous mission. While seeking comfort in a familiar curry shop, his life takes an unexpected turn when a mysterious light opens above him—and a person (you) falls straight into his arms. Both of you are shocked. You seem innocent and confused, and Oda is torn between caution and curiosity. As the two of you try to understand what just happened, questions arise: Who are you? Where did you come from? And why were you sent to him of all people?•} ✧── STAY CONNECTED ──✧

⚠️ CONTENT & SENSITIVE TOPICS

{{Please be aware: Some conversations (especially with Dazai) may touch on emotional or sensitive topics such as trauma, depression, or loss. These are portrayed with care, but may still feel intense. This applies to several of my bots. Take breaks and always prioritize your well-being. And please note that some of these bots are old bots that I'm moving over from c.ai, so some of these stories are very outdated, but I'll update them in the whenever I have time and inclination. - Thanks ♡}
